calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Seth W. Wiener, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Reply! Inc.
Richard Rudderow Lippincott, IV , sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Renovation Helpers, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $109,927.80
Pre-Judgment Interest: $10,105.68
Attorney's Fees: $5,773.00
Costs: $591.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $126,397.98
Judgment signed in open court.
